name: Sherried Walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Line two cookie sheets with waxed paper.
2. Combine the first five ingredients in a heavy large saucepan.
3. Stir over medium heat until the sugar dissolves.
4. Cook without stirring until a clip-on candy thermometer registers 240 degrees F, about 10 minutes.
5. Remove from heat. Add the nuts and stir until the syrup begins to look cloudy, about 2 minutes.
6. Divide the mixture between the cookie sheets.
7. Working quickly, separate the nuts with a fork.
(Can be made up to 1 week ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.)
